report.summary: Standup v7 ~17:06 CET — 5 agents ran since v6 (16:10); DeFAI guide (3,200w) built + queued; TON + options published (QUEUE now 1); 3 OG images filled (referral, notifications, xp-attestation); 9-post social batch staged (TON 7-thread + options + tax); Day 16 of GSC window — organic signals overdue; build 1b4a15e still broken 6h+; rate limiting 0/6.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v6 (~16:10 CET)
items: 📄 PUBLISHED: publish-v4 (16:21) promoted /learn/ton-blockchain-guide + /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide → PUBLISHED_PAGES. QUEUE went empty at that point.

📋 NEW IN QUEUE: build-v3 (16:46) scaffolded /learn/defai-guide-2026 — 3,200-word DeFAI guide (AI agents in DeFi) with DeFAIProtocolExplorer.tsx interactive component (8 protocols, search/filter/sort). Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Queue is at 1.

🎨 Design-v6 (16:56): UX/accessibility pass on DeFAIProtocolExplorer + CoursesHub + EcosystemStore. 3 OG images created: og-referral.svg, og-notifications.svg, og-xp-attestation.svg. Only 1 OG gap remains (share page — low priority). ARIA roles, keyboard nav, mobile flex-wrap, tab roles all patched.

📣 Community-v9 (16:50): 7-post TON blockchain Twitter thread drafted (900M MAU Telegram angle), crypto options tweet, April 15 tax reminder (31-day countdown = urgency spike). Discord/Telegram announcement with Telegram Easter egg. Thursday newsletter section with TON lead + Pectra Degen Corner. 2 SVG social cards saved to /public/ (social-ton-blockchain-guide.svg, social-crypto-options-trading-guide.svg). Posting schedule: Sun carry-forwards → Mon TON/Options Discord → Tue TON thread → Wed Options tweet → Thu newsletter → Fri tax reminder.

📊 EOD-v4 (16:56): Production confirmed stable on 674W9yNzq (35m, 3m 59s build). 287 pages live (note: v6 said 288+ — confirmed 287 by direct EOD audit, delta = TON/options published but counted in eod's snapshot). Build 1b4a15e fail persists 5h+.

🔍 GSC Organic Window: Day 16. This is the outer edge of the 14–21 day window where Google typically indexes and starts serving impressions. All analytics still projection-based but first organic signals could arrive any time — potentially today. No impressions/clicks confirmed yet.

🆕 Content gap filled: DeFAI ($18B+ AI-agent sector) — no competing page existed on degen0x. Interactive protocol explorer with Almanak ($90M TVL), Virtuals ($1B+ ecosystem), ElizaOS (ai16z, $2.8B market cap, 'WordPress for AI agents') coverage.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/ton-blockchain-guide — TON sharding, Telegram 950M MAU funnel, DeFi ecosystem table, STON.fi/DeDust/Bemo. Live in production.
PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide — Calls/puts/Greeks, 5 strategies, DeFi protocols, OptionsPayoffCalculator.tsx interactive component. Live in production.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/defai-guide-2026 — DeFAI guide 3,200w + DeFAIProtocolExplorer.tsx. QA-ready, awaiting promotion.

OPEN 🔴 Build error 1b4a15e — 'use client' + metadata conflict in AICourseRecommendations.tsx (lines 96, 126–127). Now 6h+. Fix is known (~15 min). Blocks Sprint 59 ecosystem/courses (78 pages) + redeploy carrying all committed changes.
OPEN 🔴 Rate limiting — 0/6 API routes protected. rate-limiter.ts built but unwired. Carry-over since Sprint 38. GSC Day 16: organic spike risk is live now.
OPEN 🔴 Vercel Pro trial — 9 days remaining. Payment action required at vercel.com/account/billing.

CARRY-OVER 🟡 Fallback data: 1/6 routes covered (market-dominance only per EOD-v4 — discrepancy with v6's 2/6 count; EOD-v4 is authoritative). prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields unprotected on cold cache + API failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100/287 published slugs missing page.tsx — triage needed.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 TS errors: 57 errors across 2 files (AICourseRecommendations.tsx + structured-data.examples.ts) — non-blocking but build-v3 added DeFAIProtocolExplorer with zero new TS errors (clean).
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect Project ID — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking all gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked.
SPRINT 58 STATUS: 0% — DeFiLlama Live API (Screener V3), Email Drip via Resend, Referral Backend, not started.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix build 1b4a15e immediately. This is now 6h+ and the fix is documented: remove metadata exports from /tools/sentiment-heatmap/page.tsx and /news/market-recap/page.tsx (add 'use client', strip metadata). AICourseRecommendations.tsx JSX parse errors (lines 96, 126–127) must also be resolved — this is the root cause per EOD-v4. Every passing hour costs another cycle where Sprint 59's 78 ecosystem + courses pages don't reach production. Assign: Programmer, next cycle, first action.

PRIORITY 2 — Publish /learn/defai-guide-2026 from PUBLISH_QUEUE, then wire rate limiting. The DeFAI guide is QA-ready and covers an $18B+ sector with no prior degen0x coverage. Publish it before the next cycle. Then: GSC Day 16 means organic signals are live or arriving today — rate limiting must be wired across all 6 routes (30-min task) before a traffic spike hits upstream APIs. Simultaneously add FALLBACK_DATA to prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields (1 line each) — EOD-v4 confirmed only 1/6 covered.

PRIORITY 3 — Execute Sprint 58 DeFiLlama live feed (Screener V3). Once Priority 1 unblocks the build and Priority 2 secures the API layer, the highest-impact Sprint 58 action is live market data in Bloomberg Screener V3. The tool is the #1 traffic driver on the site and is still running mock data 16 days post-launch. This is the quality signal that transforms degen0x from 'looks like a tool' to 'is a tool' — especially as Google evaluators begin hitting pages organically.
